title: StopTime
description: The scheduled arrival and departure times for a vehicle at a specific stop within a vehicle journey.

arrivalTime.description: Scheduled arrival time in HH:MM:SS format

departureTime.description: Scheduled departure time in HH:MM:SS format

stopSequence.description: Order of this stop within the vehicle journey

stopRef.description: Reference to the stop for this stop time

pickupType.description: How passengers board at this stop (0=regular, 1=no_pickup, 2=phone_agency, 3=coordinate_with_driver)

dropOffType.description: How passengers alight at this stop (0=regular, 1=no_drop_off, 2=phone_agency, 3=coordinate_with_driver)

distanceTraveled.description: Distance from the route origin to this stop in metres

startDate.description: Start date and time of the period

endDate.description: End date and time of the period

startTime.description: Start time of day in HH:MM:SS format

endTime.description: End time of day in HH:MM:SS format
